environment_declaration: this is a SANDBOX environment, not a production configuration. No test conclusion, performance number, or stability result from it may be presented as evidence of production readiness; production admission is re-evaluated only after Stage 3+4.
model_delta_note: Sandbox server is specified to run qwen3-vl-8b-int4; production v2 specifies cloud qwen3-vl-30b-A3B and admin-side qwen3-vl-4b (MNN). These are replaceable configured defaults, not Giraffe product identity or an ecosystem dependency. Results, once executed, are chain-validity evidence, not model-quality evidence.
